updates.title: Unified Media Retention & Advanced File Support
updates.description: Standardized the retention policy to 14 days for all message types including text, images, and attachments. Added native support for multi-modal sharing including 4K videos, zip archives, and HTML documents with a 200MB limit per file.
updates.rationale: To ensure user privacy while providing a robust, high-capacity file sharing experience similar to native messaging apps.

updates.title: Performance Optimization (120Hz)
updates.description: Optimized rendering pipelines to ensure a lag-free experience on high-refresh-rate mobile devices. Refined auto-scroll logic for seamless media interaction.
updates.rationale: To provide a premium, smooth user experience on modern flagship smartphones.

updates.title: Visual Identity & Backgrounds
updates.description: Implemented high-fidelity real-time visual feedback for media uploads and integrated a premium WhatsApp-inspired doodle background.
updates.rationale: Enhances emotional resonance and provides a professional, stable feel to the interface.

updates.title: Glassmorphism 2.0 & News Notifications
updates.description: Integrated a full Glassmorphism 2.0 interface with backdrop blur and refined profile management. Added a strategic news notification system for offline users.
updates.rationale: Achieves a state-of-the-art aesthetic and improves user retention through non-intrusive updates.

updates.title: Latency Reduction & UI Cleanup
updates.description: Removed redundant UI elements and optimized image loading times to resolve latency issues.
updates.rationale: Streamlines the user experience and ensures lightning-fast interactions.

updates.title: Database Management & Security
updates.description: Implemented 'Clear Chat' and 'No Lock' session continuity mechanisms. Finalized early retention logic.
updates.rationale: Provides users with more control over their data and ensures uninterrupted chat sessions.

updates.title: Desktop-Native Layout Transformation
updates.description: Converted the mobile-first UI into a full-bleed, desktop-native responsive layout.
updates.rationale: Optimizes usability for both large monitor users and mobile-first users simultaneously.
